scripts.build: bun run --filter @transhooter/contracts build && bun run --filter @transhooter/server-core build && bun run --filter @transhooter/telemetry build && bun run --filter @transhooter/control-worker build && bun run --filter @transhooter/web build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --filter @transhooter/contracts typecheck && bun run --filter @transhooter/server-core typecheck && bun run --filter @transhooter/telemetry typecheck && bun run --filter @transhooter/control-worker typecheck && bun run --filter @transhooter/web typecheck
scripts.format: biome check --write . && uv run --project packages/translation-runtime --frozen ruff format packages/translation-runtime apps/translation-worker apps/spool-drainer
scripts.format:check: biome format . && uv run --project packages/translation-runtime --frozen ruff format --check packages/translation-runtime apps/translation-worker apps/spool-drainer
scripts.test: bun run test:contracts && bun test packages/contracts/test packages/server-core/tests packages/telemetry/test apps/control-worker/test apps/web/lib && uv run --project packages/translation-runtime --frozen pytest
